expected_path_note: involvement=Y (purchase of services by a government agency) -> ... -> verification=No (no construction of buildings/transport/public-services infrastructure) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 24 – IT Services Provider To Government Ministry Belarus
activities: Viktor Lukashenko-Petrov owns an IT company in Minsk whose main contract is supplying and maintaining document-management software for a Belarusian government ministry. The company installs servers and trains ministry staff; it performs no building, civil-engineering or installation works of any physical infrastructure. Government software contracts represent about 70% of its revenues.
origin_of_assets: Profits of the IT services company.
